content.json:
# 🔍 Threat Detection Dashboard — Cloud SOC Canada
Detection coverage across Azure AD, Azure Activity, and Security Alerts.

> **Tip:** Use time range picker to scope all panels simultaneously.

content.query:
let brute = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where ResultType != 0
    | summarize Fails=count() by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
    | where Fails >= 10
    | extend Category="Brute Force", Severity="High";
let privEsc = AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where OperationName has "Add member to role"
    | extend Category="Privilege Escalation", Severity="High", UserPrincipalName=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
    | project TimeGenerated, Category, Severity, UserPrincipalName;
let suspicious = AzureActivity
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where OperationNameValue has "delete" and ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
    | summarize Deletes=count() by Caller, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
    | where Deletes >= 5
    | extend Category="Bulk Deletion", Severity="High", UserPrincipalName=Caller;
union brute, privEsc, suspicious
| where '{SeverityFilter}' == "All" or Severity == '{SeverityFilter}'
| summarize AlertCount=count() by Category
| order by AlertCount desc
content.title: Threat Categories Detected

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{SeverityFilter}' == "All" or AlertSeverity == '{SeverityFilter}'
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, Description, CompromisedEntity, Tactics
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| limit 100
content.title: Security Alerts — Detail View

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Add member to role","Add eligible member","Remove member from role")
| extend
    Actor  = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
    Target = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName),
    Role   = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| summarize Changes=count() by Actor, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by Changes desc
| limit 20
content.title: Most Active Role Change Actors

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType == 0
| extend Country=tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| summarize Logins=count(), Users=dcount(UserPrincipalName) by Country
| where Country != ""
| order by Logins desc
| limit 20
content.title: Successful Logins by Country

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| summarize Ops=count() by OperationNameValue
| top 15 by Ops desc
content.title: Top Azure Operations
